decision: A concrete non-enabled Gemini execution manifest now exists, but no Gemini run, workflow, or schedule is authorized until evidence packet generation, output validation, secret/WIF boundary, cost/quota and log privacy checks are reviewed.

evaluated_acceptance.evidence: The manifest selects google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli release v0.1.22 at commit f77273f4c914e4bf38440cf36a0369cb64a37489 and defines the secret boundary.
Read-only operation remains unproven until a manual dry-run PR shows exact workflow permissions, checkout credential handling and artifact behavior.
No Gemini dry run was executed; bounded Markdown plus JSON output remains untested.
The manifest defines required boundaries, but real cost/quota and log behavior are not yet observed.

organs.cabinet: Records the execution manifest and no-effect boundary.
organs.bureau: Owns queue/task state and should not open dependent Gemini tasks until a dry-run gate exists.
organs.grabowski: May execute repo-local doc/contract changes, not Gemini runtime actions without a typed task/gate.
organs.github_ci: Primary check surface for PR and validation status.
organs.gemini: Not yet an authorized actor; proposal-only candidate after future dry-run evidence.

still_missing: workflow PR for manual dry run
secret or WIF availability without disclosure
bounded Markdown plus JSON dry-run evidence
next_action: Build a deterministic evidence packet generator and Gemini output validator before any workflow or dry run.
